backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the backend with user approval, session management, materials, and payment features, using mixins for blob storage and authorization with admin-gated operations.
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that passes through the state unchanged, serving as a no-op migration runner for the backend actor.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two implemented features: try/catch error handling for IC0508 canister errors in admin payment/student pages, and a canister health check indicator in AdminLayout.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI component variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'The Rajat's Equation', a math coaching platform, loading the main TSX module and setting favicon/meta tags.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a route tree, React Query client, and an ErrorBoundary with default error and 404 fallback UI.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple reusable loading spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) rendered as an animated spinning border div.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Notification bell popover component for students that filters, displays, and marks notifications as read using the local store, supporting both broadcast and targeted notifications.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: A modal component that displays a payment receipt with details like amount, student name, course, UPI transaction ID, and status, with a close button.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a statistic with a title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and color-coded styling (blue, gold, green, or purple).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a color-coded label for a given status value (pending, approved, rejected, confirmed, cancelled, completed, or failed).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button component that opens a WhatsApp chat with a pre-encoded message to a hardcoded phone number, styled with WhatsApp green.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Custom hooks for fetching attendance records and summary for a student, and for marking attendance, all backed by React Query mutations and queries against the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanisterHealth.ts: A hook that periodically checks canister availability by calling a lightweight actor method and exposes online/checking state, detecting IC0508 stopped-canister errors specifically.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Custom hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting study materials for a student via the ICP actor, using React Query for caching and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Custom hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting tutoring sessions for a student via the ICP actor, using React Query for caching and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties (design tokens) for light and dark themes using a deep blue and gold color scheme.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout component featuring a collapsible sidebar with navigation links, a canister health status badge, pending payment count badge, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that initializes the app store on mount and renders child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Student portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, user info display, notification bell, and logout, wrapping student-facing pages via Outlet.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Thin authentication helper module that re-exports auth utilities from store.ts and provides convenience functions to get the current student ID and check admin/student roles from localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: localStorage-based data store defining TypeScript interfaces for all domain entities (Student, Course, Session, Payment, etc.) and providing CRUD helpers with default seed data including admin credentials and sample courses.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging (cn), and formatting currency (INR), dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for viewing and marking student attendance, fetching approved students from the backend actor and sessions/attendance via hooks, with a note that backend marking requires a student Principal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin course management page supporting create, edit, delete, and active/inactive toggling of courses stored in localStorage, displayed in a card grid with a modal form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying summary stats (total, active, pending students; sessions; materials; approved payments) fetched from the backend actor and localStorage, plus recent students and sessions lists.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for managing per-student learning materials, allowing admins to select a student, add new materials (with title, file URL, type, and related course), and delete existing ones from localStorage-backed store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and deleting tutoring sessions for individual students, storing session details (date, time, duration, Google Meet link, topic) in the localStorage-backed store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Alternative admin materials page that fetches approved students from both the ICP backend (via actor/react-query) and localStorage, then allows adding and deleting material links stored locally under 'adminMaterials'.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending notifications (broadcast or targeted to a specific student) with type selection, and listing/deleting existing notifications from the localStorage store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for reviewing, approving (generating access and unique codes), and rejecting student payment submissions stored in localStorage, with filtering by status and clipboard copy support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for scheduling tutoring sessions, allowing selection of approved students and saving session details (date, time, meet link, topic) to localStorage. Also displays and allows deletion of previously created sessions with optional student filtering.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page for managing student payment records, merging data from the backend canister and localStorage, with support for approving/rejecting students and generating unique access codes.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page displaying a navbar, hero section, stats, feature highlights, and testimonials for the math tutoring service, with links to login and registration.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both student and admin authentication modes, with primary backend actor auth and localStorage fallback for students, then navigating to the appropriate dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple static page displayed when a payment fails, offering links to retry payment or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that marks the corresponding payment as approved in localStorage and adds a success notification, then shows confirmation UI with links to the dashboard and payments page.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Student registration form that collects personal info, course selection, session type, hours, and UPI transaction ID, then saves a pending payment and student record to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Student-facing booking page for submitting session requests by selecting a course, session type, hours, and UPI transaction ID, saving the pending payment to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Student page displaying enrolled courses with material counts and pricing details, showing a WhatsApp contact prompt if no courses are enrolled.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing a welcome banner, stats (total classes, upcoming, materials, completed), and lists of upcoming sessions and recent materials pulled from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Student-facing page that loads and displays study materials assigned to the logged-in student, grouped by course, with file type icons and download links.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Alternative student materials page that reads from localStorage (`adminMaterials`) and displays materials assigned to the student by email or ID, with a link to view each file.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Student sessions page that reads from localStorage (`adminSessions`) and displays upcoming and past classes with attendance status badges and a Google Meet join link.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Student payments page showing a summary of total spent, approved, and pending payments, with a detailed list of all payment records and a receipt modal.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page displaying contact info, account status, enrolled courses, and a copyable access code for approved students.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page that fetches sessions from the store and separates them into upcoming and past lists, rendering each with date, time, duration, and a Join button for upcoming sessions.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public routes, role-guarded admin and student layout routes, and all page-level child routes with auth checks via localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom brand colors (navy, gold), OKLCH CSS variable-based design tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including known IC0508 canister-stopped bug, completed features for error handling and health check UI, and a pending task to harden the approveUpiPayment Motoko method.
